title: asterolasia rupestris
intro: Asterolasia rupestris, also known as the 'Rock Asterolasia', is a small shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Asterolasia rupestris include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to aid in the healing process of wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
